title: Live Action Segment
wikitext:
[]: Live Action Segment             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 17, 2004 3:49 pm It has become difficult recently to find stuff worth mentioning or commenting on. On occasion I come across something like what I have in store for you today. Some of you might be aware that Hideaki Anno filmed some live action segments for the End of Evangelion. Much of the live action you see is without characters or dialogue, just serene imagery of daily life in Japan. However one segment he did have filmed featured a world where Shinji did not exist, where Asuka and Touji live together, where Misato is their neighbor, and Rei is Asuka's Senpai. The segment deals with Asuka's life without Shinji, and at the end, Shinji adresses that he is not within that world. This segment was unused, and was eventually chopped up into bits, and can be found at the very beginning of the End of Evangelion. For a bit more info on this segment, check out the Eva Otaku's page on this segment, it has some details and translation of the audio. I'm not certain if this copy of the video is complete, as there is some additional dialogue at the end that is not in this video file. It might have not been completed, I'm not certain. But nevertheless, this video offers an interesting look into the creative process of the End of Evangelion. Enjoy! (to download right click and "Save Target As...")

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Aug 17, 2004 4:07 pm Ummm, I'm getting this everytime I try to download it.... "The requested site is either unavailable or cannot be found. Please try again later."

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Tue Aug 17, 2004 4:08 pm cain luppus wrote: Ummm, I'm getting this everytime I try to download it.... "The requested site is either unavailable or cannot be found. Please try again later."

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Aug 17, 2004 4:16 pm .....merf

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Tue Aug 17, 2004 6:13 pm Wow, what an interesting discovery. I wonder why he chose not to use that.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 17, 2004 7:51 pm Nephilim wrote: cain luppus wrote: Ummm, I'm getting this everytime I try to download it.... "The requested site is either unavailable or cannot be found. Please try again later."

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Wed Aug 18, 2004 1:18 am Well... the thing is... i don't speak Japanese man! :roll: Does somebody have a subtitle for that??? It was so cool to see that video, i could see were that eye in EoE was from, but Asuka didn't work for me as a Japanese girl.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Wed Aug 18, 2004 1:44 am Look at Monkey's post, there is a link to the translation. Asuka turned Japanese and became a slut.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Aug 18, 2004 1:48 am Ah! I'd been wondering about this forever... :shock: Thanks for posting it up. <3

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 18, 2004 2:05 am Asuka Langley wrote: <3

[]:             Quote Post by ShoKenju » Wed Aug 18, 2004 2:07 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Asuka Langley wrote: <3

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Aug 18, 2004 2:19 am ShoKenju wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Asuka Langley wrote: <3

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 18, 2004 2:58 am ShoKenju wrote: no, shes mine. you cant have her o.o

[]:             Quote Post by Slade » Wed Aug 18, 2004 4:18 am Your right that was a very interesting discovery. It proabably wouldve made EOE just about 11 min longer then it needed to be, that would be my guess as to why they cut it.

[]:             Quote Post by Treeves056 » Wed Aug 18, 2004 4:22 am damnit cant download the codec

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Wed Aug 18, 2004 6:27 am Treeves056 wrote: damnit cant download the codec

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 18, 2004 8:27 am Slade wrote: Your right that was a very interesting discovery. It proabably wouldve made EOE just about 11 min longer then it needed to be, that would be my guess as to why they cut it.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Wed Aug 18, 2004 11:23 am It was interesting...I think...I'm not *that* bad of a hardcore eva to enjoy it was much as some of you might have. It was kind of depressing because they didn't even tried to make the actors look like their coresponding characters, except for, maybe, Misato. I'm not to certain, but wasn't that her trademark red NERV jacket she hung on her door, or was that just a red shirt? Anyway, thanks for sharing it Eva Monkey.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Wed Aug 18, 2004 12:11 pm I think it was just supposed to be a more realistic scenario, an alternate reality if you will. Perhaps in a world without Shinji that's how things would be. Asuka would be Japanese and a slut. Also on the otaku sight they estimate Asuka's age as 24 instead of 14. So it can be assumed that perhaps this takes place in the future or that Asuka was born ealier. I liked the camera work when Shinji's voice is placed at the end. The camera almost seems to run and hide when Asuka turns around to look at the voice of Shinji. It gives you the illusion that the camera is in fact Shinji's perspective.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 18, 2004 12:40 pm I need to find some info on who the actresses are. I'm not sure if the actual voice actresses did the acting, but the voices of the characters sounded pretty spot on. The visual quality of the file is pretty bad, so its hard to tell. That and I'm not good at telling seiyuu apart that I've only seen a few pics of on occasion.
